<div>Tenon Medical <br></div>
<ul>

<div><br></div>
<div>Ojo technologies <br></div>
<ul>
<li>I spoke with Michelle Lee, my initial contact, and she expressed gratitude for my visit and the proposal. While it's still being reviewed, they currently have some higher-priority projects. She suggested I follow up in a few weeks, specifically by the end of this month. I also left some mints as a gesture of goodwill.<br></li>
</ul>
